overview: Stikbook is a child-safe social media platform promoting young talent. This is a visually stunning animated promotional website showcasing the platform's features including AI content filtering, Stikcoins currency, and Stikdeals discount marketplace.
features: Animated hero section with particle effects
AI Safety explainer with animated shield
Interactive profile type cards (Business vs Personal)
Stikcoins activity showcase with coin animations
Stikdeals coupon cards with hover effects
App download CTA with CSS phone mockup
